mapper.insert: MERGE INTO NF_EDOC_RCVRY_MGT AS RCVRY USING ( VALUES( #{custNo}, #{tradNo}, #{edocCd}, #{rcvryMk} ) ) AS MRG (CUST_NO, TRAD_NO, EDOC_CD, RCVRY_MK) ON ( RCVRY.CUST_NO = MRG.CUST_NO AND RCVRY.TRAD_NO = MRG.TRAD_NO AND RCVRY.EDOC_CD = MRG.EDOC_CD AND RCVRY.RCVRY_MK = MRG.RCVRY_MK ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET RCVRY_DATA = #{rcvryData, jdbcType=CLOB}, UPD_DT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( CUST_NO , TRAD_NO , EDOC_CD , RCVRY_DATA , RCVRY_MK , UPD_DT ) VALUES ( MRG.CUST_NO , MRG.TRAD_NO , MRG.EDOC_CD , #{rcvryData,jdbcType=CLOB} , MRG.RCVRY_MK , CURRENT TIMESTAMP )
